statistics.name: assists
statistics.description: The number of times a player who passes the ball to a teammate in a way that leads to a score by field goal, meaning that he or she was "assisting" in the basket. There is some judgment involved in deciding whether a passer should be credited with an assist.

article.description: Jaden Jackson had 17 of his 21 points and all three of his 3-pointers in the first half to help Utah Valley coast to a 104-60 win over NAIA Antelope Valley.
article.headline: Jackson, Utah Valley beat Antelope Valley 104-60
article.linkText: Jackson, Utah Valley beat Antelope Valley 104-60
article.story: OREM, Utah -- Jaden Jackson had 17 of his 21 points and all three of his 3-pointers in the first half to help Utah Valley coast to a 104-60 win over NAIA Antelope Valley. The Wolverines (2-2) took the lead for good immediately after Antelope Valley opened the scoring and stretched to a 59-29 lead on Tyler Ott's 3-pointer at halftime. Marcel Davis, Darrious Hamilton and Konner Frey had 15 points for Utah Valley, which shot 12 of 25 from 3-point range. Cory Cardwell added 14 points and Alex Carr grabbed 11 rebounds. Utah Valley had its largest lead at the final buzzer. Franky Teran had 16 points and Kadeem Minor had 13 for the Pioneers. It was their second of a three-game road trip against Division I opponents. They lost Thursday night to Weber State 90-47 and visit Loyola Marymount on Sunday.
